Color legend: Reasoning (API) Large (API) Open-source Baseline  |  Reasoning Depth: R1 = Recall, R2 = Comprehension, R3 = Inference  |  MLLM Dims: VP = Visual Perception, K = Knowledge, R = Reasoning, OCR  |  CE Aspects: Adm. = Administration, EI = Element Identification, LU = Language Understanding, DR = Dimensional Recognition, SU = Design Semantic Understanding, QTO = Quantity Take Off, Comp. = Compliance
